flags.gates: Board 3 A0-only filter (media excluded as evidence)
flags.rollback_path: set false / wrangler versions deploy b189d3cc0703 (T040)

flags.gates: R2 raw-artifact dual-write side path (bypass, in try/catch)
flags.rollback_path: set false / wrangler versions deploy 657fe32a (T022 flag off)

flags.gates: RUM sample rate [0,1] -- the canary DIAL (throttle load / D1 writes)

error_budget_autostop.mechanism: R2 dual-write halts (over_budget) at >= guardFrac of the free-tier limit; the canary error-budget rule reuses each flag's kill switch as the auto-stop lever

canary_plan.strategy: open new paths incrementally behind independent flags, never big-bang
cohorts: shadow (flag on, no user-visible change / capped)
dial-up via RUM_SAMPLE or per-board/route slice
canary_plan.monitoring: RUM Core Web Vitals (LCP/CLS/INP) per theme/route/device (T081) + DIR-007 budget usage

rollback_paths.BOARD3_A0_ONLY: set false / wrangler versions deploy b189d3cc0703 (T040)
rollback_paths.RAW_DUALWRITE: set false / wrangler versions deploy 657fe32a (T022 flag off)

error_budget_auto_stop.quality: on a CWV error-budget breach (e.g. LCP/INP p75 regressing past threshold with min-samples), auto-disable the canary flag / lower RUM_SAMPLE (fail-closed)

held_capabilities_rollout.A1/A2 subnational: each cohort behind a source-enable flag; per-cohort Owner promotion gate
held_capabilities_rollout.S5 depth / S6 models: behind a NOT_DEPLOYED feature flag; promotion-gated, canary via cohort

live_build: b189d3cc0703 (unchanged; framework verifies the existing mechanism, deploys nothing)
